full_text: Rajitha to Williamson, Caught by Kusal Mendis!! Edged and caught! This is a disaster for New Zealand - On a good length and shaping away from off, KW saw the width and went with hard hands on the drive - the ball climbed onto him, caught the outside edge and Kusal Mendis did the rest. The top-order has been blown away and New Zealand find themselves in a heap of trouble. KW could have anchored this boat, but he's gone now.

full_text: Dhananjaya to Conway, Bowled!! full_text: Boult to Asalanka, Caught by Finn Allen!! Boult on fire! Sri Lanka have been reduced to 8/4 within the powerplay as the Kiwis are on top. full_text: Boult to Kusal Mendis, Caught by Conway!! The two NZ openers departed early, and the Sri Lankan openers join the party as well. Even they depart without doing much. This was angled away from the batter outside off and Kusal Mendis pushed at it with lack of footwork. Gets a regulation outside edge and Conway completes the formalities. The swing-kings are at it once again. They have managed to keep the momentum in NZ's favour after that sublime finish to their innings.
